summary: Iteration 177: Verified 3-category commessa creation workflow (STRUTTURALE EN_1090, CANCELLO EN_13241, GENERICA). All features working correctly: category button selection, conditional form fields, normativa persistence, and CommessaOpsPanel conditional section rendering.

issues: Minor React warning: Missing `Description` for {DialogContent} - does not affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: CreateCommessaModal (PlanningPage.js lines 588-833): Excellent implementation of CATEGORIA_LAVORO array with 3 colorful category buttons
Form fields correctly show/hide based on normativa_tipo selection (classe_exc for EN_1090, tipologia_chiusura for EN_13241, info text for GENERICA)
CommessaOpsPanel (lines 105-175): Clean conditional rendering using isGenerica, isEN1090, isEN13241 flags
Backend commesse.py (line 298): normativa_tipo correctly persisted to database
Validation: 'Scegli il tipo di lavoro' toast shows when trying to save without category selection
seed_data_creation: Test commesse created and cleaned up during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: 3-category workflow verified: CreateCommessaModal with data-testid='btn-cat-en_1090', 'btn-cat-en_13241', 'btn-cat-generica' buttons. CommessaOpsPanel sections conditionally render based on normativaTipo. EN_1090 shows all sections (8), EN_13241 shows 6 (includes Certificazione Cancello), GENERICA shows only 3 (Produzione, Conto Lavoro, Repository). Normativa banner displays correctly for each category type.

backend_api_tests.board_view: 200 OK - commesse appear in correct columns

frontend_ui_tests.category_buttons: All 3 visible and clickable (Strutturale, Cancello, Generica)

conditional_fields.GENERICA: Shows info text 'Lavoro senza marcatura CE'

ops_panel_sections.EN_1090: 8 sections visible (all including Tracciabilità, CAM, Fascicolo Tecnico)
